Our Philosophy

Why Cookielabs
Exists

Cookielabs isn't simply an ad agency. We specialize in helping premium healthcare and aesthetic practices build predictable patient acquisition systems — engineered from the ground up to attract patients who are genuinely ready to invest in their health and appearance.

We help healthcare and aesthetic practices create consistent consultation booking systems that generate qualified patients through Meta advertising and high-converting funnels. Every campaign we build is tied to a specific outcome: more qualified consultations booked, more revenue generated, and a sustainable, scalable path to practice growth.

The System

How Our System Works

A four-step acquisition engine that takes a cold prospect from first impression to booked consultation.

Step 01

Target the Right Patients

We identify high-intent patients using Meta Ads — reaching people actively researching the treatments and procedures your practice offers.

Step 02

Qualify Prospects

We qualify prospects through optimised funnels and lead forms — filtering for genuine, high-intent patients before they reach your team.

Step 03

Fast Follow-Up

Your team follows up with interested prospects quickly — via WhatsApp, phone, or your preferred workflow — while intent is at its highest.

Step 04

Book More Consultations

You book more consultations and convert more patients — with a predictable acquisition system that grows and compounds over time.

Our Specialisation

Built for Consultation-Driven Businesses

Most marketing agencies treat healthcare practices like any other business. We don't. Our systems are specifically designed for practices where a consultation is the critical first step — and where the value of each patient relationship is measured in thousands, not hundreds.

Why Specialisation Matters

Generic marketing agencies don't understand the regulatory sensitivities, high-ticket nature, or trust requirements of premium healthcare marketing. Cookielabs works exclusively with consultation-based practices — which means our systems, copy, and targeting are built around how patients actually make decisions about their health and appearance. The result: higher-quality leads, better conversion rates, and a more predictable patient pipeline.

Our Edge

Why Choose Cookielabs

Meta Ads Expertise

We live inside Meta's advertising ecosystem, building campaigns that reach high-intent patients at the exact moment they're researching treatments and procedures.

Consultation Booking Systems

We don't just generate leads — we build the full qualification and booking infrastructure so the right people reach your team, ready to buy.

Strategic Funnel Design

Every touchpoint — from ad creative to landing page to follow-up — is designed with one goal: converting a stranger into a booked consultation.

Conversion Optimisation

We continuously test, measure, and improve. What works gets scaled; what doesn't gets cut. Your budget always moves toward what's working.

Weekly Campaign Optimisation

No set-and-forget here. We review performance weekly and make data-backed adjustments to keep your campaigns performing at their peak.

Data-Driven Decisions

Every choice we make is backed by real performance data. No guesswork, no gut feelings — just clear numbers pointing to the next best action.

Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Most clients begin seeing qualified leads within the first 5–14 days of campaign activation. Full momentum typically builds over 30 days as the algorithm optimises and retargeting audiences develop. We set realistic expectations upfront and communicate weekly so you always know what's happening.
Yes — we work with healthcare and aesthetic practices worldwide. We have active clients across West Africa, Kenya, the USA, Canada, and beyond. Our systems are built to perform in any market where Meta Ads are available. Book a strategy call and we'll discuss your specific location and goals.
No — ad spend is paid directly to Meta and is separate from our management fees. This ensures full transparency: you always know exactly how much is going to advertising versus management. We'll recommend an appropriate budget on your strategy call based on your goals.
Not necessarily. Many of our campaigns use standalone landing pages rather than your main website. Our Growth and Premium packages include dedicated high-converting landing pages purpose-built for lead generation. You don't need an existing site to get started.
Absolutely. Landing page build is included in our Growth and Premium packages. We design and build conversion-optimised pages specifically for aesthetic clinic lead generation, including lead qualification forms, WhatsApp CTAs, and retargeting pixel setup.
Book a free strategy call using the button below. On the call, we'll review your practice, your goals, your current marketing setup, and recommend the right package. If we're a good fit, onboarding takes less than a week and campaigns typically go live within 7–10 days.
